title: The Universal Self-Introduction Script
description: A simple English text to practice speaking about yourself. It helps you learn common sentence structures and use them in everyday conversations.

title: Productivity Finally Made Sense
description: I stopped forcing myself and built a system that actually works.

title: Learning From Every Source
description: A reflection on collecting useful ideas from videos, books, conversations, and everyday life.

title: The Compound Effect
description: A story about how small daily habits create a huge difference over time. Two men, two lifestyles, one powerful lesson.

title: Most People Wait Too Long to Change
description: A powerful reflection on why we wait for pain to start improving. Don't wait for disaster — sharpen your sword while life is still calm.

title: How I Learn English
description: A personal story about learning English over four years — different methods, challenges, and the importance of daily practice.
